the bcm through relay or when the ignition switch is in acc or on position the output status of the front wiper is as follow front wiper mode switch switch stop single wipe auto wipe low speed wipe high speed wipe disconnected closed high speed wipe thebcm will send signal to the wiper relay when relay close the power supply connect the motor directly through the resistor for deceleration at this stage the wiper work at high speed low speed wipe when choosing low speed wipe mode the bcm send signal to the wiper relay the power supply pass through relay before connecting with the motor by resistor the resistor reduce the power so the wiper work at low speed auto wipe variable intermittent wipe the function of variable intermittent wipe the vehicle is provided with wiper delay potentiometer when receiving valid wiper interval request the bcm will control the wiper at slow speed the time of intermittent wipe vary with the vehicle speed level and the setting of wiper delay potentiometer when the switch is in intermittent low speed or high speed position the bcm will adjust the interval of intermittent wipe according to the vehicle speed abs ecu monitor the wheel speed signal and transmit it to the bcm through hs can bus if the wiper washer lever switch is in the intermittent wipe the bcm adjust the selected delay time by comparing vehicle speed with the resistance lighting description overview the interior lighting system is controlled by the body control module bcm which is located on the passenger side of the vehicle behind the glovebox the interior lighting comprise front reading lamp boot lamp front reading lamp lining above the the assembly is retained with two screw which locate in bracket attached to the roof panel spring clip provide retention to the headlining the interior lamp assembly has one non latching switch for the interior lamp operation the lamp is located in plastic moulding which also provide the location for the passenger airbag disabled warning lamp the interior lamp is fitted with single filament bulb the assembly is connected to the body harness the len can be removed to allow for replacement of the bulb boot lamp the boot loadspace lamp is located in the rh trim panel in the load space the lamp comprise plastic moulding which incorporate len and also provide location for bulb holder the boot lamp operate automatically when the boot is opened door is opened bulb specification lamp bulb type voltage power front reading lamp luggage compartment lamp lighting lighting system operation overview interior lighting interior lighting include front reading lamp luggage compartment lamp interior backlight bcmit receive signal of the interior lighting system when the bcm receive the reading lamp signal door switch signal or luggage compartment open signal it will illuminate the corresponding lamp inside the vehicle pwminterior lighting controlled by pwm interior lamp under control include the front reading lamp and luggage compartment lamp the interior door lighting system can be controlled by auto mode or manual mode auto mode pwm control no need to press the switch the bcm will control the working status of the interior lamp according to the signal received caution at the moment of engine start the interior light with turned on will be off after that it will relight on automatically the interior lamp will illuminate automatically under the following condition when pressing the unlock button on the remote key or using the mechanical key to unlock the door the front reading lamp illuminate gradually if the door is not unlocked within the front reading lamp will dim gradually after the ignition switch is off and the position lamp is on the reading lamp will illuminate gradually if the door is not unlocked within the reading lamp will dim gradually when the ignition switch is off within after the position lamp goe out the reading lamp will illuminate gradually if any door is opened the reading lamp will illuminate gradually if the interior lamp illuminate all door are in the closed state when the ignition switch is shifted to off position from acc or on position the interior lamp will dim gradually in when pressing the lock button on the remote key or using the mechanical key to lock the door the interior lamp will dim gradually when all door are in the closed state and the ignition switch is in acc or on position the interior lamp will dim gradually if any door is opened the interior lamp will illuminate and gradually dim in for the energy saving function of the battery is on monitor the following exterior lamp direction indicator lamp excluding side direction indicator lamp hazard warning lamp brake lamp when the brake pedal is depressed the brake lamp illuminate and the ecm monitor the brake lamp through the hard wire and send the braking status signal to other ecus to use through the can bus direction indicator lamp when the ignition switch is in on position and the direction indicator lamp switch is enabled the bcm flash the corresponding direction indicator lamp by identifying the switch status of the direction indicator lamp then the direction indicator lamp on the instrument pack flash and provide the current status of the direction indicator lamp for the driver by acoustic warning rear fog lamp when the ignition switch is in on position the low beam headlamp is enabled then the activation of the rear fog lamp switch can illuminate the rear fog lamp the bcm send the on off status of the rear fog lamp to the ipk by receiving the activation signal of the rear fog lamp and the indicator of rear fog lamp on the ipk illuminate when the rear fog lamp switch low beam headlamp or front fog lamp if equipped is disabled the rear fog lamp is cancelled if the rear fog lamp is already activated at the time of engine start it will remain on hazard warning lamp the hazard warning lamp is comprised of the front rear direction indicator lamp and side direction indicator lamp the hazard warning lamp switch is marked with triangle which is touch switch when the hazard warning lamp is activated the triangle mark on the switch will flash when the position lamp or headlamp is enabled the triangle mark dim but it will still flash the hazard warning lamp can be activated manually regardless of current position of the ignition switch operation priority of direction indicator lamp and hazard warning lamp if the direction indicator lamp switch is enabled when the hazard warning lamp is working the direction indicator lamp will cancel the hazard warning lamp then the hazard warning lamp will still flash after the direction indicator lamp switch or ignition switch is disabled indicator lamp is working the hazard warning lamp will cancel the direction indicator lamp the direction indicator lamp will resume after the hazard warning lamp is disabled the hazard warning lamp can be activated automatically under the following situation in case of impact when the bcm detect an impact signal it will activate the hazard warning lamp automatically accidental activation of the hazard warning lamp during impact can be cancelled by pressing the hazard warning lamp switch for more than low beam headlamp when the ignition switch is in on position and the lamp lever switch is turned to the low beam the low beam headlamp illuminate the low beam headlamp is controlled by the relay in the bcm high beam headlamp when the ignition switch is in on position the bcm close the high beam relay and illuminate the high beam headlamp by identifying the status of the lamp lever switch when the high beam is enabled the indicator of high beam on the ipk illuminate position lamp tail lamp license plate lamp the position lamp tail lamp and license plate lamp are controlled by the same output port of the bcm when moving the headlamp and width lamp knob to width lamp position the bcm can detect the on signal of the width lamp tail lamp and license plate lamp and output signal to turn on an external relay so that the width lamp tail lamp and license plate lamp will illuminate simultaneously reverse lamp with the ignition switch in on position the reverse lamp illuminate when the shift lever is moved to gear lamp lighting system note for vehicle vehicle vehicle with with with automatic automatic automatic transmission transmission indicator lamp output front reading lamp output warning request signal body control module body system door unlock output ground body system body control module operation overview when the ignition switch is enabled the bcm will wake up the security system lighting system and diagnostic system when the ignition switch is in acc position the bcm allow the washer wiper and power window system to operate when the ignition switch is in on position the fuel system start to work and the bcm communicate and transmit information with other ecus through the can and lin bus load management bcm can manage the load of some electric appliance by configuration and ensure low battery power consumption during storage and transportation or idle time production mode it is configured for the bcm during vehicle assembly transportation mode after vehicle assembly programme the bcm so that the transportation mode can be used during transportation and low battery problem can be avoided when the factory deliver the vehicle to the authorized local after sale service centre this mode may restrict the function of some electric appliance the rear fog lamp doe not work when the engine is off the high beam headlamp doe not work when the engine is off the low beam headlamp doe not work when the engine is off the reverse lamp doe not work when the engine is off the direction indicator lamp doe not work when the engine is off the daytime running lamp if equipped doe not work when the engine is off follow me home function cannot be realized if the engine is disabled the hazard warning lamp backlight doe not work but the function of this lamp is not affected when the engine is disabled the window can be ascended but cannot be descended with the aftermarket diagnostic tool the local mg authorised repairer can shift the vehicle load management configuration from transportation mode to normal mode normal mode this mode apply the default setting after completion of the pdi the vehicle can enter into normal operation sleep mode with the ignition switch off and the can and lin buse disabled if the battery is still connected the bcm will stay in sleep mode and be prepared for receiving the signal from the can and lin buse wake up mode in sleep mode when one of the following operation is done the bcm will be waked up activation signal of hazard warning lamp switch is received activation signal of direction indicator lamp switch is received lock signal of internal lock is received unlock signal of internal lock is received activation signal of driver door switch is received activation signal of passenger door switch is received receive the activation signal of the luggage compartment lid switch receive the activation signal of the luggage compartment lid release switch activation signal of driver door lock switch is received activation signal of driver door unlock switch is received ignition switch is in acc position ignition switch is in on position activation signal of internal lamp switch linwake up signal from lin bus canwake up signal from can bus wake up signal from local hard wire valid radio frequency signal load management to meet the demand of the starter motor for high current during engine start some electric appliance shall be powered off for example disconnect the power of the hrw intelligent stop start energy saving system disable switch high beam headlamp reverse lamp horn and interior lamp etc after the engine is started reactivate each electric appliance to limit the current consumption of the battery diagnosis bcm monitor information input and output if any fault is detected the corresponding dtc will be stored in the fault record bcm can detect short and open circuit as well as wrong signal of the can and lin buse when any fault is detected the bcm will close the corresponding function when the fault is eliminated the corresponding function will be activated next time when the activation request is received body control module panel assembly tail gate panel assembly collision repair body repair collision repair body material for different strength requirement of different body part this model adopt various high strength steel plate and ultra high strength steel plate hot formed steel plate the detailed position of different material are as follow only service as per relevant instruction in the manufacturer service manual and service of high strength steel plate and hot formed steel plate as per the modern inverter technology are allowed during the service of the galvanized steel plate the following matter should be noted the paint and zinc coating should be completely ground off before grinding be careful when grinding apply the spot welding paint between the weld contact surface before the spot welding with hairbrush or spray particle on the surface will be absorbed by the electrode so it is necessary to clean the electrode tip frequently body repair collision repair damage diagnosis damage detection during damage detection visually inspect the location collided to determine the direction and size of the impact and check for potential damage for vehicle damaged in an accident query the vehicle speed impact location or rollover location andunderstand the impact form location and angle of the impacted vehicle etc by the impact and area that may be affected by the impact test drive and measuring instrument can also be used for the thorough check of the vehicle confirm if the underbody is deformed and if the whole body is damaged and twisted check if the door can function properly etc to determine the level of damage and the method of repair vehicle visual inspection detail visual inspection damage determination deformation occur not only at the impact location but also at the whole body such as beam suspension and engine etc along the course of the impact systematically check the related part for damage until there is no any sign of damage and the damage in the surrounding area is found characteristic of body damage characteristic of damage caused by front impact characteristic of damage caused by middle impact characteristic of damage caused by rear impact damage measurement accurate measurement is one of the necessary process for completion of impact repair for integral body measurement is more important for successful damage repair because the steering system and suspension are on the body and some suspension are designed according to the requirement for assembly to ensure correct steering and driveability the fit tolerance of the key machining size shall be within the permissible range measurement shall combine with remove operation or it is impossible to determine the damage to facilitate body repair and thorough examination of damage and avoid damage of the part removed due to repair remove the related part the principle for remove is to avoid any component damage measuring point selection screw hole process hole of the component overlap of the body steel sheet machining gap or raised imprint on the steel sheet collision repair body repair method of measurement distance measurement the simplest and most practical method is to measure the distance between the reference point of the component with steel tape centreing measure by locating the centre three dimensional coordinate measurement measure the data of the three dimensional coordinate on the measuring point selected and compare the data with those of the vehicle to determine body damage electronic measurement more accurate and more effective reason for error in body size measurement the error is due to the accuracy of the measuring tool or equipment itself error due to human factor failure to locate the measuring point wrong method is used for measurement failure to use the measuring tool and equipment in proper way precaution for measurement level the body before measurement mark measuring point on the body to prevent confusion make accurate measurement carry out multiple measurement recheck the result of the measurement body repair collision repair repair plan determination underbody correction when the vehicle is severely damaged the underbody is deformed no need to replace the whole body correct the underbody first underbody correction ensure the three dimensional position of the underbody and the general position of the body determine the position of the engine assembly and front suspension and recover the angle for wheel alignment and the position of other assembly after underbody correction repair the body panel body and covering component correction after an impact if the body and covering component only have repairable depression or deformation no serious damage occur no need to replace the component recover its shape by correction sheet metal replacement when the body part has damage at one location or more than one location and the damage or corrosion is beyond the specified degree it is worthless to repair it or repair cannot help it to achieve the specified technical standard and function requirement then replace the sheet metal body replacement when the vehicle is severely damaged the whole body is smashed by the impact the underbody is seriously deformed the two side roof cover engine hood and trunk lid are almost destroyed and the whole body is unrepairable then replace the body according to user demand remove usable assembly and component from the damaged vehicle thoroughly check and repair the major assembly such as engine replace the body assembly and part that shall be replaced and reassemble them according to the assembly process of the vehicle partial replacement when impact occur and only local damage appear for example damage to the front rear fender door engine hood or trunk lid partial replacement can be performed for the body this save trouble time and reduce the cost body pillar replacement when the body pillar windshield pillar front or rear pillar is badly damaged and cannot be corrected by simple repair replace it recover the large scale deformation before replacing the pillar collision repair body repair body correction the purpose of body correction is to recover the correct position and size of the sheet metal by eliminating the deformation plastic deformation and residue stress caused by collision introduction of correcting equipment the correcting equipment shall provide the following feature the equipment shall have high strength body positioning device and fixture it shall have service puller with various shape and different function that can meet the repair requirement for different location be able to perform multipoint and comprehensive correction drawing be able to accurately measure and detect the deviation and repair error for each reference point operation process for correcting equipment regardless of the type of the equipment used its operation is broadly divided into the following step get on the vehicle position clamping drawing measurement auxiliary fixture prevent motion of the vehicle force caused by even and disperse drawing auxiliary support prevent secondary damage to the body due to drawing focus the drawing force on the damaged location and improve the efficiency of the drawing operation prevent moment resulted from drawing correction drawing method drawing sequence note the method and procedure for drawing during drawing draw for little while then release the chain unload and make measurement operate from inside to outside take length as the priority draw the vehicle in the longitudinal direction along the centreline of the vehicle then correct the width correct the vehicle in the horizontal direction finally correct the height stress elimination eliminate the stress during drawing knock the raised location beside the deformed region and the back knock the welding location of the deformed region knock the ridge of the deformed region knock the reinforcement of the deformed region the high strength integral body is susceptible to heat so do not attempt to complete the correction drawing just by operation of one step generally follow the cyclic process draw keep balance draw keep balance if some body are folded after an impact and there is risk of metal damage then heat it when heating only heat the corner or the location where the two panel are connected heating is merely mean to eliminate metal stress not method to be used to soften some location note do not service the body by heating oxygen acetylene apply tensile force to the predetermined location recover the size and shape of the damaged steel sheet carefully and slowly body repair collision repair completely eliminate the stress of the curved steel sheet to achieve accurate repair of the body note overstretch shall be avoided during body correction the only solution to overstretch is to replace the damaged sheet metal collision repair body repair panel repair panel repair method puller method for sheet metal repair meson machine in recent year for this method number of flat gasket puller is welded according to the size of the damaged sheet metal the flat gasket puller is traction medium insert the wire into the medium and draw the wire with manual or mechanical manner apply force to the damaged sheet metal through the medium so that it can be drawn outward and resume its position and shape especially for larger deformation bilayer structure inaccessible location corner transition and door pillar etc the puller traction method provide more convenient method for repair heat shrinkage method local heat shrinkage is commonly used method for sheet metal repair deformation of the sheet metal refer to tensile useheatshrinkagemethod to eliminate tensile stress and resume the shape hammer and jacking block method the hammer and jacking block method is conventional method for sheet metal repair the metaler hold the hammer with one hand and the jacking block with the other hand or use other tool to strike the sheet metal for repair the manual work of the sheet metal require the metaler to have the appropriate skill and experience good repair skill cannot be obtained overnight repair of the sheet metal include repair of the deformed surface and correction of the shape line technical requirement for panel repair no matter which method is used to repair the body surface the specified technical requirement shall be met and the performance and appearance quality of the vehicle shall be resumed shape recovery for repair the shape of the large smooth structure and the wedge structure of the local transition shall be recovered when it is hard to recover the shape change the original shape in an appropriate way the shape shall be symmetrical beautiful firm and durable integrity and fineness of continuous surface most of the car body are produced by mould stamping which have the integrity and fineness of the surface for repair the streamline surface shall have continuous transition the transition point of the surface shall have smooth transition ripple wrinkle dent knock mark scratch and visible defect or obvious defect that can be sensed by touch are not allowed especially for large scale repair ensure the integrity streamline feature continuity and fineness of the continuous surface sufficient strength and rigidity the body of the original design has sufficient strength and rigidity the body repaired shall ensure sufficient strength and rigidity thepermissiblerange ensure the body has no any fatigue damage within the certain distance the entire body shall have the specified rigidity make sure the body panel is able to maintain its shape in use body repair collision repair sheet metal replacement the process for sheet metal replacement is as follow preparation before cutting new old sheet metal remove damaged sheet metal position adjustment and cutting of new part treatment and corrosion prevention before welding final position and welding of the panel treatment after welding accessory installation and inspection after operation principle for sheet metal replacement thin panel replacement thin panel replacement is made for aesthetic purpose and shall follow the requirement below cutting is performed on the shortest position from the foam damage to the foam by welding shall be avoided position ofofof the foam when replacing the pillar and rear fender please remove the windshield do not cut location including any reinforcement thick panel replacement thick panel replacement is made for strength purpose and shall follow the requirement below do not cut the energy absorption area no cutting is allowed within from the front rear of the position for laser welding cutting is performed on the shortest position from the foam damage to the foam by welding shall be avoided position ofofof the foam do not cut location including any reinforcement to ensure welding penetration the size of the cutting seam shall be equal to the thickness of panel preparation before cutting new old sheet metal remove all sealer residue with hot air gun to reduce the toxic fume generated due to heat during welding straighten the existing panel side seam with form block and hammer indicate the actual cutting position on the old body part reserve paper adhesive tape and indicate the location for welding spot elimination welding information provided manufacturer indicate the actual cutting position on the new body part and paste the paper adhesive tape damaged sheet metal remove position the welding spot grind the welding spot carry out rough cut and remove the welding spot collision repair body repair remove the damaged sheet metal position adjustment and cutting of new part position the new panel on the body and adjust its position and size compare the hole adjust the clearance surface cut the new old panel by overlap take care not to cut the reinforcement inside the body remove the new panel and cut the excess old panel section by section mark the punch position for welding the plug hole treatment and corrosion prevention before welding new body part grind the location for welding and sealant application to remove the paint film grind the location for welding and sealant application to remove the old paint film burr and rust from the welding joint but do not grind the cross section of the joint clean the location for welding and sealant application on the new part and body and wait for to volatilise the detergent paint zinc spray to the welding junction of the new part and body that doe not need sealant and control the thickness of the zinc spray apply structure sealant before application remove and discard the sealant to ensure uniform bond of the panel welding shall be finished within the time specified by the structure sealant or bond of the panel will be affected final position and welding of the panel adjusting panel refit confirm the position of the ridge compare the hole body repair collision repair adjust surrounding clearance adjust the difference between the high surface and the low surface position of gas shielded welding select gas ratio of argon to ensure the accuracy of the position positioned welding shall be performed on both side of the ridge instead of on the ridge and the distance of the positioned welding shall be above trial welding before spot welding select an electric welding arm for resistance spot welding and shape the electrode head with nozzle finisher finish the nozzle making its diameter equal to time the welding thickness and plus another caution use arm not exceeding mm in length fit the resistance spot welding arm and test equipment with test silicon slice so as to meet the operation requirement if there is no monitoring device the weld strength can be tested by checking welding pool pull wire around the metal under tensile force during the stretch welding sequence welding sequence to decrease the possibility of strength reduction due to welding shunt it is recommended that you begin with the direct welding and follow the sequence shown below the distance between the welding spot shall be collision repair body repair welding requirement if the resistance spot welding has been used in production new resistance spot welding must be done at any other feasible position during spot welding to ensure the quality of the welding test coupon of the same metal gauge and material are recommended for peeling test if condition permit the welding quality monitor can be used to ensure welding quality if the satisfactory spot welding can not be achieved plug weld welding must be used length of the welding rod holder of hand spot welding gun must be no more than single sided spot welding is not allowed neither braze welding nor gas welding is allowed unless it is specified in production gas shielded welding plug welding when welding the region with layer or more than layer of panel or the welding nozzle is close to the restricted area and resistance spot welding is impossible use the hole made by the cutter for spot welding or punch or drill hole to perform the mag plug welding the diameter of the hole for plug welding of the structural component is and that for plug welding of the covering component is the ratio of the welding spot for plug welding to the manufacturer welding spot is gas shielded welding butt welding treatment after welding process for corrosion prevention use disc polisher or belt polisher to grind or finish all welding location and clean the location paint anti corrosion primer which can prevent corrosion and improve the adhesion of the sealant apply sealant fill the seam between the panel to realise the leak prevention purpose position ofofof sealant deliver the vehicle to the painter for painting apply wax to the cavity before fitting the accessory information ofofof cavity wax application body repair painting painting overview the purpose of painting is to provide an excellent appearance decoration gloss protection colour protection corrosion resistance and longer service life so it has distinctive feature painting is high level protective painting the coating shall have superb corrosion resistance weather resistance acid alkali resistance inclusion resistance and an extensive adaptability etc painting mainly refer to body painting is high level decorative painting and careful design good working environment and condition are required for providing the coating with good decoration vehicle decoration mainly rely on painting the quality of the painting has direct influence on the commercial value of the vehicle painting is the most typical industrial painting it require reasonable and effective pretreatment method drying method and process preparation painting is multi coating painting system and the painting quality and process control of each coating is of great importance coating introduction coating composition duringmanufacture resistant coating zinc coating of the raw material zinc phosphate coating electrocoating intermediate coating and top coat aftermarket paint repair is composed of the primer coat putty coat intermediatecoating coating function of each coating zinc coating with good function of anti corrosion anti rust good paint adhesion decorative performance and forming property zinc phosphate coating the first paint that is directly applied to the treated workpiece surface and is the base for the whole coating its characteristic are as follow it shall have good adhesion to the treated surface of the workpiece and the primer film formed shall have an excellent mechanical strength it shall serve as corrosion inhibitor and the primer coating shall have an excellent corrosion resistance water resistance and chemical resistance it shall well fit the intermediate coating or top coat it shall have good workability electrocoating enhance cavity corrosion resistance improve the uniformity and leveling of the paint film thickness raise the quality of the paint film painting efficiency and paint utilization efficiency putty coat used for the object surface with primer precoat so as to fill the pit weld seam scratch rust hole etc on the object surface until the surface become smooth intermediate coating it is the last intermediate coat before applying the top coat its binder content is between the primer and the top coat and the paint film is bright and semi bright it provide the following function enhance the adhesion between the primer and the top coat increase the total thickness of the coating and improve the film build improve the corrosion resistance and weather resistance of the primer top coat repair minor defect on the substrate surface raise the decoration performance of the top coat painting body repair top coat top coat is used for the final coating of the multi coating it directly affect the decoration performance weather resistance gloss protection colour protection chemical resistance contaminant resistance and appearance of the vehicle classification of top coat the classification of the top coat by colour effect is as follow pure pigmented paint containing resin pigment and additive only metallic paint containing metal powder with better gloss and saturation pear paint comparing with the metallic paint instead of using metallic paint it use mica powder coated with titanium dioxide and ferrum dioxide to improve the texture and gloss of the paint film by application procedure it can be classified into the following process single process system that use one type of paint to form complete surface coating single process pure pigmented paint and metallic paint are included double process paint to form complete surface coating generally the pigmented paint is applied before the finishing varnish is painted double process pure pigmented paint metallic paint and pearl paint are included three process usually layer of primer is required for thenalayerofpearlpaint andfinallyalayerof finishing varnish the combination of these three coating form complete surface coating three process pearl paint and coloured varnish are included principle of paint repair the following principle must be followed when repairing the painted surface use the certified jointing sealant to seal the inner and outer jointing repair all damaged part of the sealant under the vehicle body use two pack paint to repair the system and it shall be consistent with the original production part apply the inner wax to the entire inner surface without paint finishing steam cleaner or high pressure cleaner must be used to clean the vehicle thoroughly before paint repair clean the local part needing requirement with warm and water soluble cleaning solution then thoroughly clean it with solvent painting must be done immediately after this operation in order to thoroughly clean the area of exposed metal due to damage of the painted surface the cleaning area shall be larger than the original damaged area use phosphate to eliminate the dust contaminant etc on the exposed metal and offer good repair environment for the new coating body repair painting painting process generally metal treatment before painting also known as pretreatment application process surface pretreatment surface pretreatment consist of the following work surface cleaning before painting thoroughly remove the mud dirt other foreign material on the vehicle especially the dirt on the door frame luggage compartment engine cover seam and wheel house failure to do so may cause the new paint film to be contaminated treatment of dissolved substance apply degreaser to the surface with the special cloth then remove the degreaser and grease residue etc with clean and dry cloth treatment of moisture and dust use clean and dry cloth toremovemoistureanddust pressure air gun coating identification and damage assessment coating identification identification of the coating on the body panel is crucial for the reapplication process improper identification may lead to serious problem for top coat application if no respray is performed the type of the coating can be determined by the vehicle manual but the type of the coating for the resprayed body shall be determined for repair damage assessment correct assessment of the damage is one of the key factor for determining the service cost and ensuring the quality of painting range of the repair treatment process transitional region location to be covered for protection and part to be removed etc are determined by correct assessment of the damage this lay the foundation for correct implementation of the subsequent process and guarantee of satisfactory repair quality assessment of the damage to the paint film include visual inspection touch and ruler removing old paint film clean the body and check the body paint carefully to see if there is any sign of damage such as bubble crack peeling rust and partial damage caused by baking repair gas welding etc for the above damage the old paint film shall be removed selection of partial elimination or full elimination of the old paint film is made according to the degree of the damage and the quality requirement after recoating sandpaper is recommended for grinding feather edge not less than precaution for mechanical grinding do not use an electric grinding machine to grind surface with big radian highly raised surface or concave surface in cross way do not use an electric grinding machine to grind the corner wrinkle seam weld junction or location with plastic sealant for grinding the grinding machine can be started only when it contact the surface of the sheet metal in this process ordeepgroove may occur and the grinding machine shall be aligned with the edge line to be ground before of the machine to avoid thermal deformation of the sheet metal do not stay the grinding machine at one position for prolonged time do not allow coarse grinding material to contact with the intact paint surface of the accessory in the grinding area it better to protect the intact coating with tape operation of sanding fine processing of the surface treated by coarse grinding its purpose is to acquire flatter surface align the front of the rotating grinding wheel the surface to be ground and keep the rear away from the surface maintain this angle move the painting body repair grinding machine up and down the proper coverage area of each grinding mark is replacing sheet metal use sandpaper to grind the electrophoretic primer by dry grinding degreasing and descaling of the metal surface remove surface rust descaling of the metal include manual descaling polishing grinding and high pressure water etc mechanical method chemical method and ultrasonic method different rust apply different method for descaling clean the metal surface again body repair painting coating application for paint repair of the pretreated sheet metal of the finished surface please refer to the detailed process below primer application cover the area around the region to be repaired use soft cloth with detergent to wipe the surface to be painted and use another clean cloth to wipe off the detergent residue on the surface purge the surface with compressed air spray anti rust primer and dry it putty application not required for new part mix the putty and curing agent according to the ratio specified by the instruction use clean putty mixing plate only mix putty enough for current use fill sandpaper mark and pore first then apply putty in the full scale flash off for after application and bake it with the infrared baking lamp according to the instruction of the putty wear dust mask select appropriate sandpaper and hard grinding block rail grinding machine can be used and take care not to grind the surrounding area when using grinding block grind in the horizontal direction and begin with the top then move down gradually clean the repair surface with an air gun use soft cloth with detergent to wipe and dry with another clean cloth intermediate coat application cover the area around the repair region prepare to apply intermediate coat the surrounding of the covered area shall be larger than the area to be sprayed above use soft cloth with detergent to wipe the surface to be painted and use another clean cloth to wipe off the detergent residue on the surface purge the surface with compressed air mix intermediate coat curing agent and diluent according to the ratio specified by the instruction apply thin film of intermediate coat first flash off for and make two wet application after levelling of cure the paint film with an infrared baking lamp coat grinding indicator layer on the surface so that the uneven surface can be easily found during grinding painting body repair perform coarse grinding with sandpaper first then perform fine grinding with sandpaper remove the covering paper from the surrounding of the repair area purge the inner outer surface of the repair area with compressed air and thoroughly remove the abrasive debris and moisture top coat application check the colour code and check the colour formulation according to the code polish the body surface around the repair area to acquire correct colour check for the difference between the colour mixed and that of the original body in the stage fluorescent lamp or sunlight when it is consistent with the vehicle to be painted dilution ratio distance pressure paint output temperature flash off time etc paint the colour test panel flash off the test panel for bake the test panel as per the specified temperature and time take care not to overheat the test panel during baking use soft cloth with detergent to wipe the area to be repaired and dry with another clean cloth pastepaperfrom the inside of the repair area and take care not to tear the covering paper purge the panel to be painted and the vehicle with compressed air take care not to damage the covering paper then wipe the surface with cloth to prevent dust particle etc from entering into the paint use strainer to pour the mixed paint into the cup of the spray gun carry out trial application check the barometric pressure paint output sector and atomization spray two wet paste coating the leveling of each shall be for silver paint virtual spraying can be carried out at the last to guarantee the silver powder is uniform varnish application after the pigmented paint is applied flash off for about when the paste coating lose its gloss completely apply varnish spray wet varnish first flash off for spray the second wet varnish flash off for before baking note do not turn off the ventilation system of the spray booth during drying use the temperature and duration specified by the product to bake the paint film infrared baking lamp can also be used to perform forced drying for afterbaking paint film is completely cool such as grinding polishing etc polishing waxing when the paint film is completely cool use sandpaper or to grind the dust sag etc on the paint film use slack wax and wool wheel to grind the location to be polished at the beginning of polishing the speed of the polisher shall not be high the speed shall be increased gradually polish with polishing wax and sponge wheel use clean sponge wheel use polishing wax to remove the swirl mark caused by polishing to restore the gloss of the paint film check if the colour of the painted location is correct in the lamplight then check it in the sunlight repair general film coating defect paint film defect caused by application and treatment particle the phenomenon that bump in the film coating are spread over the whole or local surface in granular form analysis of possible cause poor air cleanliness and impurity in the painting environment such as dust worker wear dirty clothe or the fiber contained in the material are easy to fall out substrate that are not properly handled have bump the vehicle body is not cleaned thoroughly etc the painting pressure is insufficient atomization is poor the spray gun is not cleaned up and an improper screen is selected the pigment or flashing material in the paint are badly dispersed the paint are unfiltered or filtered improperly the paint become deteriorated and show abnormal sign such as separate out flocculation the film is moved out of the baking booth before drying the surface to dust free preventive measure ensure that the spraying environment is clean ensure that the object to be painted and worker are cleaned thoroughly before entering the baking booth ensure the paint performance the deteriorated and poorly dispersed paint are not applicable set the optimal parameter for paint application and use the spray gun to spray after the paint being filtered defect treatment the tiny dirty spot can be polished after removed by abrasive paper if the impurity particle are large or the dirty spot on the surface of primer and even surfacer can only be ground to the extent that the spot disappear completely perform the spraying again sag upon the liquid paint is sprayed onto the workpiece surface some wet film surface run down creating unevenly stripe and sag which are thin on the top and thick on the bottom resulting in the local thicker film on vertical surface it can be divided into sinking sagging and running depending on the shape of sag analysis of possible cause the painted workpiece surface is too cold low application environment temperature slow wind speed and high solvent vapor content in the ambient air low product temperature low spraying pressure slow gunning speed short distance to spray gun thicker film large caliber of spray gun poor atomization of spray gun slow solvent evaporation rate and low paint viscosity short distance between spray gun and workpiece slower gunning speed thicker spraying coating insufficient flash off interval between layer preventive measure improve the painting environment control the appropriate ambient temperature humidity and wind speed choose the correct solvent and pay attention to select the dissolving capacity and evaporation rate of the solvent strictly control the viscosity and the temperature for coating application andincrease the gun distance and gunning speed full flash off between layer defect treatment for the local varnish sagging it can be sanded to eliminate the sagging defect before being polished if this defect exist or if the sagging defect is more severe or it appear on the surfacer layer and the color paint layer finally revealed on the layer of varnish the sagging must be sanded thoroughly and make the spraying again pin hole eye small needle hole on the top of them which are referred to as pin hole the solvent contained in the film coating evaporate rapidly during the surface drying its left trace form hole these pin hole are known as defect that the hole are still on the substrate are not filled up they are easily generated at the corner of workpiece analysis of possible cause pin hole the paint are mixed with impurity for example water enter into the solvent based coating the painted object have dirt on their surface the flash off interval between layer is insufficient during application the continuous spraying is too thick the temperature rise up suddenly and the surface is dried rapidly when stoving pin eye the uneven location on the original workpiece surface are not filled up precaution and improvement set appropriate temperature and humidity for application wind speed and other condition body repair painting mix the paint and solvent in proportion to ensure the proper fluidness it should be heated up slowly to avoid the rapid solvent evaporation full flash off interval between layer defect treatment the defect should be completely ground to remove the pin hole and pin eye then repaint it blistering part of the film coating float off the painted surface or prime coat and is filled with liquid or gas which is about in diameter or float off in large piece if there is some water under the film the vapor generated by evaporation of water will plump up the film to form blister when the temperature rise up analysis of possible cause the ambient humidity is high and the film is dried naturally after spraying resulting in moisture infiltrating into the film the substrate is not dried properly the drying time is short between coating the heating and drying are too fast grind the putty while adding water and the putty absorb water there is oil or water in the compressed air line preventive measure grind the dry putty ensure that the previous coating has met the requirement for cleanness and dryness before spraying reduce the humidity in the painting and spraying room use the curing agent and diluent suitable for environment temperature make it dry as soon as possible once the spraying is completed to prevent the moisture from infiltrating into the film defect treatment once blister appear on the film surface this surface should be ground to remove the blistering defect completely then respray it depending on the surface condition orange skin the orange skin is used to describe the leveling property of the film when you observe the film surface against the light you can see different ripple of presenting on the film surface and the brightness and plumpness vary in different ripple area such texture on the film surface which is similar to orange peel is known as orange skin analysis of possible cause the substrate is not flat or the finish coating is sprayed to the surfacer surface without having the orange skin ground smooth the ambient temperature is high the wind speed is fast and the substrate temperature is high the diluent volatiliz rapidly the paint has high viscosity and the film is too thin the distance from spray gun is too far the gunning speed is too fast the spraying pressure is low and the amount of paint out of spray gun is little preventive measure grind the intermediate coating completely smooth according to the process requirement control the ambient temperature and wind speed use the diluent suitable for that temperature and adjust the paint viscosity as per the paint manufacturer product instruction adjust the gun pressure then regulate the gun to proper distance and reduce the gunning speed as per the manufacturer instruction spray the appropriate layer to ensure that the film get the desired thickness defect treatment only perform the grinding and polishing if the defect of orange skin is slight the orange skin should be ground to completely removed and then be resprayed if the defect is serious sanding scratch the sanding scratch left by sanding substrate are visible on the film after spraying the paint sometime the sanding scratch on the substrate will extend due to the erosion caused by solvent contained in the film the upper film would be subsided gradually after period resulting in the sanding scratch more and more obvious analysis of possible cause if the improper abrasive paper are used to sand the substrate the sanding scratch will be wide and unable to be covered and filled up by upper film if the lower film is sanded and sprayed with upper film over it before it isn totally dry it is easy to make the sanding scratch to extend due to the erosion caused by solvent in the upper film and form the sanding scratch defect the diluent that has high solubility for upper paint or too slow to dry has been misused preventive measure painting body repair when you select the abrasive paper number to make sanding you should observe the principle that the abrasive paper number should not be jumped by level each replacement ensure that the lower film is totally dry before sanding select the correct upper film solvent as per the product instruction defect treatment for slight sanding scratch they can be removed or made less obvious by sanding and polishing as they have been filled up by paint for the sanding scratch that are more obvious they cannot be removed by sanding and polishing it should be resprayed after removing the scratch putty mark putty mark mean the defect that trace is left along the edge of putty application area after spraying the surfacer or finish analysis of possible cause the feather edge are improperly treated before putty application the putty is mixed with curing agent in improper proportion the next action is taken before the putty is completely dry sanding spraying the surfacer etc the putty is not flat enough the feather edge do not meet the standard and it is higher or lower than the old surrounding coating or metal the curing agent and diluent mixed in the surfacer or finish are dried slowly or the flash off interval between layer are too short when spraying the surfacer or finish resulting in the edge expanded and extended preventive measure the width of the feather edge must be and the surface is smooth without step before putty application adding the curing agent in proper proportion according to the product instruction make sure to perform the sanding and spray the surfacer when the putty is totally dry use the correct curing agent and diluent and ensure the flash off interval between layer is enough the periphery of putty must be sanded to be qualified not only the putty but also the extended old surrounding coating should be sanded when you sand the putty edge to allow the putty together with the surrounding to form flat surface defect treatment once the putty mark appear those area should be sanded and apply the putty again and respray the surfacer and finish lifting the lower layer paint is single component or even if it is two component it is not dry and cured completely including improper amount of curing agent is used when the paint is sprayed above it the solvent contained in upper film will erode the lower film causing the uplift and shrink present on the lower film surface analysis of possible cause the lower film is not totally dry the lower film become deteriorated the continuous spraying of surfacer or finish result in too thick surface or the used curing agent and diluent are too slow to dry or the diluent with high solubility is used or the flash off interval between layer are too short when spraying the surfacer or finish or the low air temperature during the spray cause the infiltration and erosion of solvent contained in the surfacer or finish resulting in the lifting occurred at the putty edge one component putty or surfacer edge preventive measure for the film not totally dry it must be sanded and sprayed with the next layer paint after it is completely dry if it cannot be totally dry due to the improper adding of curing agent it need to respray the paint mixed with proper curing agent after film removal for the deteriorated film shown as chalking cracking loss of gloss they must be removed totally and resprayed with two component surfacer or finish use the correct mating curing agent and diluent and ensure the flash off interval between layer is enough use the two component putty and surfacer defect treatment when the lifting defect appear it should be sanded to remove any defect at the lifting area if the lifting is severe the film that has lifting should also be sanded and removed completely then spray the two component surfacer and finish paint film defect caused by operating environment and treatment paint film defect caused by external corrosive material defect phenomenon the film defect occur when the film is affected by the acidic and alkaline material as well as industrial fall out such as asphalt oil battery electrolyte bird dropping sap acid rain pollen dust produced by steel plant and black carbon from boiler stack it generally appear body repair painting as uplift discolor and even cracking and peeling caused by the contaminant infiltrating into the film defect treatment if the film defect is tiny it can be recovered only by polishing the surface damage if the film has been discolored the defective area should be sanded until eliminating the defect then respray it water spot defect phenomenon when the rainwater on the film surface or the tap water left by car washing is heated to evaporate white ring drop mark will be left on the water drop area and cannot be removed by common cleaning method cause as the water contain mineral substance such as calcium when the water is heated to evaporate some warm water will infiltrate into the softened film with heat and the left mineral substance infiltrate into the coating defect prevention and treatment try not to wash the car under the sunlight and wipe the water drop off the vehicle surface after washing to avoid evaporation caused by heating it should only be polished when water spot appear stone crash damage defect phenomenon some small stone may hit the film and cause the film peeling during vehicle traveling the area where the film is peeled off usually form the surface with sharp and jagged edge sometime small indentation will appear in the middle of this area the front edge of the vehicle engine hood or the roof is usually damaged by stone defect treatment when the stone crash damage occur the film on the defective area must be removed and sanded to feather edge and filled up with putty or surfacer then continue to apply the surfacer and finish if the area hit by stone is rusted the rust must be removed thoroughly when new original part are sprayed if the finish is directly sprayed onto the electrophoretic coating without spraying surfacer and when the plastic part are sprayed if the surfacer and finish are not added with softening agent depending on the plastic hardness the stone crash protection for the film will be reduced and the film is easy to hit off by stone and sand discolor chalking loss of gloss defect phenomenon as the vehicle expose to the ultraviolet ray the pigment deterioration of the film cause color fading the resin deterioration cause yellowing the film peel off as powder and lose gloss defect treatment color fading is representation of film aging it is usually shown up together with chalking and full loss of gloss once any one of these defect occur the defective film must be sanded and removed thoroughly then respray the two component surfacer and finish seal body repair seal overview process area of underbody seal underbody area and doorsill outer panel should be processed with plastisol pvc underbody sealer this sealer shall not be reused when repairing the sealer for the underbody area the underbody sealer upon delivery should be removed and returned to the proper breakpoint expose the clean metal surface and the current sealing edge shall also fit firmly to the panel use new chassis sealant between the primer and the intermediate primer if necessary use the seam sealant before applying the chassis sealant before coating the chassis sealant fit the plug and insulating ring on the disk type floor except the part for wax spray refit the heat fusible plug damaged in repair with heat blower or replace them with rubber insulating ring before using new chassis sealant cover the suspension wheel tyre power unit exhaust system and brake system including all mounting point seam sealant for factory assembly apply pvc sealant treated by baking to special joint weld and sheet metal edge this kind of material is not suitable for repair so approved special sealant shall be used for aftersale service seam sealant is used after the primer and before the intermediate primer and outer coat the spray of the seam sealant must be smooth and continuous and the spray line depend on the type of the seam if the sealant is coated by brush pay special attention to the coverage area required for the weld at the place needing sealant formation use cloth dipped in the solvent oil to complete the required operation remember to seal all the seam to be processed after each repair the area away from the joggled joint often distort when the vehicle is damaged thus sealant for these place will frequently occur in the following repair and correction check all the weld around the area to be repaired to see whether it is damaged then process the damage as required then coat new sealant specific step are as follow clean the affected seam re process the exposed metal area with proper etch primer coat proper sealant at the required place process the affected area with acid etch primer chassis sealant is also acceptable and apply proper colour paint film after reassembly or refit of part if the seam is plugged then apply paste seam sealant to such seam blockage of the seam may occur after panel repair in this case apply sealant and paint before final assembly if the inlet is of proper size apply seam sealant to the two side of the joint to be repaired if the spray can be only done to one side such as compartment then use cavity wax to process the affected compartment beam seam which require sealant when assembling in the plant is described in the figure below test overview process of the leaking problem need to combine technique experience and instinct to take proper and effective measure do not come to conclusion fast only by naked eye test tool and instrument thebelow tool and instrument are recommended to use garden sprayer manual wet dry vacuum cleaner dry absorbent cloth battery torch mirror weatherstrip locating tool trim panel remover small wooden or plastic wedge dry compressed air supply hot blower sealer applicator ultrasonic leak detector when checking for leak at least the following part should be checked front inner space rear seat space storage compartment or luggage compartment test method and measure the operator at the fitting center can judge from where to check the leakage by information offered by the customer the next step is to find the leaking spot after the leaking place is founded for the first case an easy and effective method is the common garden sprayer nozzle of this extruding garden sprayer ought to be adjusted so that water can be sucked into the nozzle directly and spray out proper spray at the dark corner mirror or battery torch cab be used the test light using supply voltage is not available the test order is very important begin from the lowest point and go up gradually this can avoid blocking off the other leaking place when an area is being checked if the test is begun from the any water flowing into the pumping chamber may drop on the pedal by baffle insulating ring even though it may be judged wrongly that seal of the fail another part for leaking check is to visually observe whether the door hole sealer insulating ring or weather strip is damaged aged or displaced meanwhile align the door with the seal note check the colour of the water around the leak if the water is dirty the leak is from under the vehicle if the water is clean it is from above when leaking spot is found the method below are necessary for resolution of the leak problem replace all of the damaged displaced and aged door hole seal and weatherstrip check all the body seal and ensure it is fixed on the fixing flange fixing face correctly if necessary the simitar can be used blow the body weld seam to be processed with compressed air and or hot blower when necessary if necessary apply sealant to the outside of the connector to prevent water when correcting leakage of the windshield and weatherstrip or polish between the upper glass and the body directly try not to remove the glass use qualified material at proper place such as glass to the weatherstrip or glass to the body initial door seal replacement the initial seal for both front and rear door are stuck on the specified position alway comply with the regulation below when replacing the weatherstrip clean the position where the door weatherstrip is located do not clean the door with paint diluent agent the ideal temperature for sticking the weatherstrip is for either the door or the weatherstrip when the temperature is less than it is hard to stick the weatherstrip do not apply too much force to stick the weatherstrip this will make disassembly or re installation much easier if the weatherstrip shall be refitted do not touch the contact face or stain it body repair seal sealant position information body seal identification between panel connected with bolt riveting joint type panel edge connected with bolt information body repair corrosion protection corrosion protection overview treatment in production during production the vehicle body apply the following method for anti corrosion treatment use galvanized steel sheet phosphate anti corrosion primer dip coating electrophoresis chip resistant coating underbody coating spray on the underbody of the main floor and rear floor and on the rear wheel opening cavity wax spray on the sheet metal part such as doorsill and rear window sill side extension and the lower sheet metal of the door protective wax spray on the opening not covered by the wheel house whenever repairing the body make sure the anti corrosion material from the repair area is also repaired or updated ensure the material used are the approved anti corrosion material precaution for body repair and operation in the workshop it is necessary to exercise caution in the operation of the vehicle for example when lifting the vehicle any carelessness and negligence can cause damage to the underbody sealant seam sealing material underbody sealing wax and body panel etc when fitting the accessory ensure that the vehicle anti corrosion protection is not impaired by broken protective layer or moisture do not screw the self tapping screw directly into the body panel pre fix the matching plastic insert to the body panel alway brush the sheet metal chassis component and drill hole edge of other body part with proper zinc rich or acid etch primer and brush the surrounding area with wax never contact the painted metal surface of the part with the body without taking appropriate protection measure between the metal surface requiring bolt connection be sure to have appropriate media such as weldable zinc rich primer or zinc strip etc the heat from the steam cleaning equipment has the risk of damaging some decorative part softening or liquefying certain adhesive and anti corrosion material so the equipment shall be adjusted so that the nozzle temperature doe not exceed do not have the steam nozzle stay in one place for long period of time the distance between the nozzle and the sheet metal surface shall be at least above during service do not remove the protective wax or paint from the underbody or lower part of the engine cover if the above area shall be cleaned with steam then apply new layer of protective wax or an underbody protection layer as soon as possible maintenance check when doing the anti corrosion check on the body observe the following step lift the vehicle visually inspect the underbody sealant for any damage lower the vehicle check the body exterior paint for damage and the body panel for corrosion note if the vehicle is dirty it will need to be washed prior to inspection of bodywork the above check refer only to visual check when checking for corrosion and paint damage do not remove the decorative panel or sound insulation material lift the vehicle and use the test lamp or spotlight to perform visual check for the following corrosion damage and paint damage and condition of the lower panel of the front rear vehicle doorsill and the underbody sealant at the wheel opening damage to underbody sealant erosion condition in surrounding area of the suspension mounting point and fuel tank mounting point note for unexposed metal the little bubble on the underbody sealing material can be neglected pay special attention to damage of the sheet metal or anti corrosion material due to incorrect lifting method warning it is essential to follow the correct jacking and lifting procedure after lowering the vehicle visually check all the visible painted surface for sign of damage and corrosion and pay special attention to the following area leading edge of the engine cover visible flanging of the engine compartment underbody and door panel take feasible measure to correct or repair any body damage or corrosion found during the inspection as soon as possible these include diminishing breakage and ensuring the long term effectiveness of the anti corrosion treatment performed in the production if the corroded area is increasingly clear and diffuse or expand from the bottom of the replaceable part such as various trim panel window glass seat etc then replace the part to achieve the most effective repair corrosion protection body repair underbody protective maintenance whenever doing maintenance work of the body ensure that the body sealing and anti corrosion protection is recovered to the original condition this apply not only to the repair work on damaged area but also to the recovery work on the protective layer of certain area indirectly weakened due to accident or maintenance operation before straightening or doing panel repair you must remove the corrosion protection layer of the damaged area it particularly important especially for the panel with protective wax layer the underbody with polyvinyl chloride pvc sealing material and the sound barrier area warning do not use oxy acetylene gas equipment to remove corrosion prevention material large volume of fume and gase are liberated by these material when they burn note the device device device used used used for removing removing removing strong strong strong anti corrosion anti corrosion anti corrosion sealant sealant sealant can provide provide provide several several several speed speed speed and tototo remove remove remove the sealing sealing sealing material material material the most common way is to remove the sealing material by using hot air dryer integrated with blade one of the most effective way is to use hot knife with fast cutting characteristic this tool use wide blade that can easily access the outline area where it is difficult to reach in some other way when doing the repair on the underbody sealant follow the following step remove the existing underbody coating after the sheet metal are repaired use solvent to clean the affected area and use the etching phosphate material to process bare metal apply new primer to the affected area caution do not under any circumstance apply underbody sealer directly to bare metal surface replace all damaged heat fusible plug if this type of plug doe not use such rubber grommet of appropriate size ensure this type of plug be implanted to the sealant after the mechanical part hose and pipe clip on the underbody are removed cover all the mounting surface the underbody sealant must be sprayed before the above component are refitted brush all exposed seam with sealant use approved underbody sealant for service to spray the affected area remove all the covering on the mounting surface of the component after refitting the above mechanical part including hose pipe and other clip cover the brake disc spray layer of approved underbody protective wax after repairing the sheet metal at the damaged wheel opening spray new wax which is also applicable for the painted surface and underbody sealant remove the old wax on the underbody and the range of the underbody wax is at least larger than the range of the new underbody sealant note where repair include the application of finish paint coat in the area requiring underbody wax carry out paint operation before applying wax cavity wax injection after repair be sure to use approved cavity wax for treatment in addition for all inner surface damaged by the repair whether these area have been treated in the production process they shall be subject to cavity wax treatment this include all the cavity and the door interior if necessary allow additional hole to be made for wax injection but these hole can not be located in the load bearing part make sure that these hole are treated by using the proper zinc rich primer and brushed with protective wax and finally sealed with the rubber ring before injecting the wax make sure the cavity to be treated is free of contaminant and foreign material if necessary use compressed air to remove the debris in the cavity alway ensure cavity wax injection is performed after the final finish and before re assembling other component during the spray process ensure that the cavity wax cover all the flange and seam and be fully distributed to the repair area of all new and existing sheet metal it is noteworthy that there is no wax injection process when assembling new sheet metal and complete body shell such operation shall be performed after repair it is quite essential to take efficient cavity wax protective measure alway observe the following point before wax injection ensure the paint repair work is completed if necessary clean the body panel area and blow the cavity prior to the operation during wax injection and drying the temperature should be at check the pattern of the injection equipment body repair corrosion protection cover all area where no protective layer is needed and the area that may be contaminated due to overspray in case of possible contamination remove the body device such as seat belt retractor before dealing with the internal structure of the door lift the door glass up to the completely closed position before refitting the component spray wax on the body area which are usually covered by trim after the wax layer is completely dry check whether the drain hole on the body and door is clean keep the equipment clean and tidy especially the wax nozzle corrosion repair if the waxing area is scratched handle it again compressed air spray gun with the integral pressure cup and replaceable spray gun pipe shall be used according to the configuration of the add on device please strictly observe the following in use when handling the film area use the rigid or movable spray gun to give spray to ensure maximum coverage for restricted opening use hook nozzle to provide more directional spray narrow inside or short compartment wax is directly sprayed to the bottom surface through the smaller spray pipe of the spray gun disconnect the liquid mm rigid spray gun the nozzle of the rigid spray gun give forward conical spray of circumference though the wax film is sprayed by single stroke it can affect all surface of the compartment internal and external spray can provide effective and complete wax coverage for the long straight structure and compartment by visual inspection the rigid spray pipe also provide position accuracy for handling the shapely location caution do not force the lance into access hole when using this attachment mm movable nylon spray gun pipe the elastic nylon spray gun share the same type with the rigid spray gun but it provide stronger penetrability it can be used to spray the inaccessible vessel of the curved section or nozzle the main disadvantage of the elastic nylon spray gun is that it cannot precisely position the internal compartment when spraying spray outward by the stroke of the spray gun when pulling the spray gun out retract it slowly and ensure the integrity of the finished spray do not pull the spray gun out with rush ensure the nylon pipe of the spray gun is away from the edge and located in the hole so that wear of the nylon pipe can be avoided and the service life of the nylon pipe can be prolonged ensure the spray operation is stopped before removing the nozzle from the port to assist in the completion of this step use red paint to mark the rear of the nozzle mm hook nozzle of movable spray gun the spray gun with rigid hook nozzle provide forward spray its conical spray is characterised by long range and good dispersion the combination of these two feature provide good capability of orientation and good effect on the short and narrow location to be sprayed beside it can also be used for direct spray of the inner wheel arc etc when using place the smooth area at the end of the spray gun to form an angle of with the location to be sprayed for location hidden in box or hole this help to finish the spray successfully for general spray arch the nozzle and move from one end to the other as required and ensure complete spray of the surface note alway clean gun after use with appropriate solvent to maintain efficiency recommended equipment schutz pistol spray gun for body the
